widget.name: EdtsInputDatepicker
widget.description: Input-style datepicker that follows the visual pattern of EdtsInput.

property.caption: Value Attribute
property.description: Select the DateTime attribute from the current object that stores the picker value.

property.caption: Minimum Date Attribute
property.description: Optional DateTime attribute used as the minimum selectable date.

property.caption: Maximum Date Attribute
property.description: Optional DateTime attribute used as the maximum selectable date.

property.caption: Label
property.description: Optional field label shown above the input.

property.caption: Placeholder
property.description: Optional placeholder text shown inside the input.

property.caption: Helper Text
property.description: Optional helper text shown below the input when there is no validation error.

property.caption: Selection Mode
property.description: Choose whether the picker selects only a date or a date with time.

property.caption: Format
property.description: Optional react-datepicker format string such as dd MMM yyyy or dd MMM yyyy HH:mm.

property.caption: Show Calendar Icon
property.description: Show the calendar icon inside the input.

property.caption: Show Month Dropdown
property.description: Allow changing month from the dropdown inside the calendar.

property.caption: Show Year Dropdown
property.description: Allow changing year from the dropdown inside the calendar.

property.caption: Allow Clear
property.description: Show a clear button when the input already has a value.

property.caption: Disabled
property.description: Disable the picker so users cannot open or change it.

property.caption: Required
property.description: Require the user to select a value.

property.caption: Required Message
property.description: Message shown when no date is selected.

property.caption: Validate On Change
property.description: Validate while the user is changing the date.

property.caption: On Change
property.description: Optional action executed after the value changes.

property.caption: On Blur
property.description: Optional action executed when the picker closes.
